text.title: Stakeholder Management Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Cross-functional GTM launch register
example.code: project_id: acme-launch-2026q3 stakeholders: - id: s-cmo name: Maria CMO power: high interest: high attitude: supporter engagement: frequency: weekly 30min channel: slack-then-1on1 content: launch readiness matrix + risks - id: s-legal name: Frank Legal power: high interest: low attitude: blocker engagement: frequency: biweekly 15min channel: doc-review content: ToS + data residency decision_rights: - decision_type: launch-go-no-go rights: - {stakeholder_id: s-cmo, role: D} - {stakeholder_id: s-legal, role: V} escalation_triggers: - {trigger: legal raises Veto on ToS, escalate_to: Head of Product} upward_comms_cadence: weekly_status: Friday 14:00 Slack monthly_review: First Tuesday 30min
example.note: Illustrates register-power-interest-attitude + engagement-cadence-per-quadrant + decision-rights-map + escalation-criteria-pre-registered + upward-comms-mandatory.

example.title: Two-axis grid, no cadence, no escalation, silent comms
example.code: project_id: p1 stakeholders: [{id: s1, name: x, power: very-high, interest: yes}] decision_rights: [] escalation_triggers: [] upward_comms_cadence: {}
